stemHtml: What is the impact of a change in Angle of Attack (AoA) on a normal shock wave at a constant Mach number?

options.a: The intensity of the shock wave decreases as AoA increases.
options.b: The location of the shock wave moves forwards on the wing.
options.c: The location of the shock wave moves rearwards on the wing.
options.d: The intensity of the shock wave increases as AoA increases.
